Defect Title: Booking may accept checkout date earlier than check-in date
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Open the create-booking request. 2) Enter valid customer information. 3) Enter check-in date 2026-08-14. 4) Enter checkout date 2026-08-10. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system should reject the booking and return a clear date-validation response.

Defect Title: Booking update may be accepted without valid authentication
Steps to Reproduce: 1) Identify an existing booking. 2) Open the update request. 3) Omit the authentication token or cookie. 4) Enter valid updated information. 5) Submit the request.
Expected Result: The system should reject the update and preserve the original booking information.
